claimText: The National Crisis Management Committee (NCMC) holds statutory status under the Disaster Management Act (Amendment) Act, 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: NCMC was granted statutory status under the Disaster Management Act (Amendment) Act, 2025.
examUse: Statement-based question on the legal backing of disaster management bodies.
distractorHooks: Claiming it is an executive body without statutory backing
Claiming it was established under the Environment Protection Act

claimText: The National Crisis Management Committee (NCMC) is headed by the Cabinet Secretary.
evidenceExcerpt: It is headed by the Cabinet Secretary.
examUse: Statement-based question on the composition and leadership of disaster management authorities.
distractorHooks: Claiming it is headed by the Prime Minister
Claiming it is headed by the Union Home Minister
Claiming it is headed by the Home Secretary

claimText: The National Crisis Management Committee (NCMC) acts as the nodal body to deal with major disasters, evaluate preparedness, and lay down policies for Disaster Management.
evidenceExcerpt: NCMC acts as the nodal body to deal with major disasters, evaluate preparedness, and lay down policies for Disaster Management.
examUse: Statement-based question on the functions of NCMC compared to other disaster management bodies.
distractorHooks: Confusing its role with the National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA)
Confusing its role with the National Executive Committee (NEC)
